title: SrPollo Dweller
description: This mod adds a monster to your world that appears on night or caves
body:
WARNING:

THIS MOD IS NOT A VIRUS IT CAN ONLY CREATE EXTERNAL WINDOWS AND DISPLAY THE GAME LANGUAGE, IT DOES NOT ACCESS THE COMPUTER'S PERSONAL INFORMATION, ITS FOR INMERSION IN GAME

THIS MOD CAN PLACE BEDROCK OR OTHERS THINGS THAT CAN DESTROY YOUR WORLD DONT PLAY IT ON IMPORTANT WORLDS

This mods adds a monster that can chase you and kill you, alucinations, advanced ia, a ritual to invoke him, and 3 structures to explore.


If you are a content creator, you can post a video of my mod, but please include the download link in the description.
